query: What is the refund policy for annual subscriptions?
retrieval_queries: What is the refund policy for annual subscriptions?
service commitment contract year unused service value

selected_chunks.chunk_text:
# Refund Policy – General Terms

This document states the standard refund policy for annual and monthly subscription purchases made through official channels.

## Cooling-off period

The 14-day cooling-off period begins on the original purchase date. Within the cooling-off window, customers are entitled to a full refund within 14 days of the original purchase, provided the service has not been substantially used during that time.

## Refund eligibility

Once the 14-day cooling-off period has passed, annual subscription fees are non-refundable. Annual subscription customers retain access to the service until the end of the paid billing period.

## Scope

This policy covers standard subscription purchases made through official service channels.

# Charge Disputes and Billing Corrections

This document covers how billing errors and incorrect charges are identified and corrected for subscription accounts. Billing correction requests are handled separately from standard subscription policy.

## Billing errors

When duplicate charges or billing errors occur, the incorrect charge will be reviewed and a refund due to error will be issued once verified. The billing team investigates duplicate charges and incorrect charge adjustments before approving corrections.

## Processing timeline

Approved corrections are processed within 5-10 business days after internal verification. The refund timeline depends on the payment method processing time and the policies of the customer's financial institution. Processing applies to verified billing error cases only.

# Service Commitment and Early Termination

Twelve-month service agreements include a fixed commitment period. Customers on a twelve-month subscription plan who discontinue service before completing the commitment period may request early termination of the contract year.

## Prorated reimbursement

When an early termination request for a twelve-month contract is approved, the unused service value for the remaining contract period is eligible for prorated reimbursement. The prorated amount is calculated based on unused months within the service commitment term and the contract year termination date.

## Review process

Termination requests are reviewed individually by the billing team. Prorated reimbursement is issued following verification of the contract year termination request.

answer:
A. Summary  
Annual subscriptions are eligible for a full refund if canceled within the 14-day cooling-off period, provided the service has not been substantially used. After the cooling-off period, annual subscription fees are generally non-refundable, but customers retain access until the end of the paid billing period. Exceptions apply in cases of billing errors and for approved early termination requests, which may qualify for prorated reimbursement of unused service value.

B. Eligibility Rules  
- Full refund available within 14 days of the original purchase date if the service has not been substantially used.  
- After the 14-day cooling-off period, annual subscription fees are non-refundable.  
- Customers retain access to the service until the end of the paid billing period after the cooling-off period.

C. Exceptions  
- Verified billing errors or duplicate charges are eligible for a refund once reviewed and approved.  
- Approved early termination requests for twelve-month contracts may qualify for prorated reimbursement of unused service value (see Section E).

D. Timeline and Process  
- Refunds for billing corrections are processed within 5-10 business days after internal verification.  
- The refund timeline may vary depending on the payment method and the customer’s financial institution.  
- Cancellation within the cooling-off period must occur within 14 days of purchase and before substantial use of the service.

E. Annual Fixed-Term Treatment  
- When an early termination request for a twelve-month contract (annual subscription) is approved, the unused service value for the remaining contract period is eligible for prorated reimbursement.
